requirement_topic.en: In-Country Importer Obligation — Importir Umum / Importir Produsen (PT Entity, API Licence)
requirement_topic.zh: 当地进口商义务——Importir Umum / Importir Produsen（PT实体，API许可证）
requirement_topic.zht: 當地進口商義務——Importir Umum / Importir Produsen（PT實體，API許可證）

summary.en: Foreign manufacturers of wireless devices cannot import their products directly into Indonesia under their own foreign legal name. An Indonesian legal entity — either an Importir Umum (IU, general importer for resale) or Importir Produsen (IP, producer importer for own production or distribution) — must be registered as the importer of record for all telecommunications equipment. The in-country importer must hold an API (Angka Pengenal Importir) licence issued by the Ministry of Trade (Kemendag): API-U for general importers or API-P for producer importers. The importer entity must be a PT (Perseroan Terbatas) or CV registered under Indonesian law. The importer's name must appear on the PIB (Pemberitahuan Impor Barang) customs import declaration filed with DJBC and may be required in the SDPPI sertifikasi perangkat application as the authorised representative. The historical term POSTEL (Pos dan Telekomunikasi) referred to the predecessor agency now operating as SDPPI under KOMINFO; the type approval certification portal retains the domain sertifikasi.postel.go.id. Without a qualifying Indonesian entity as importer, DJBC will refuse customs clearance for telecommunications equipment.
summary.zh: 无线设备境外制造商不得以境外法人名义直接将产品进口至印度尼西亚。所有电信设备须由印度尼西亚法律实体——Importir Umum（IU，经销进口商）或Importir Produsen（IP，自用生产进口商）——担任进口备案方。当地进口商须持有贸易部（Kemendag）颁发的API（Angka Pengenal Importir）许可证：普通进口商持API-U，生产进口商持API-P。进口商实体须为依印度尼西亚法律注册的PT（有限责任公司）或CV。进口商名称须载明于向DJBC申报的PIB（Pemberitahuan Impor Barang）进口报关单，并可能须作为授权代表列入SDPPI sertifikasi perangkat申请。历史术语POSTEL（邮政与电信）指现已更名为KOMINFO下SDPPI的前身机构；型号认证申报门户仍保留域名sertifikasi.postel.go.id。若无符合资质的印度尼西亚实体担任进口商，DJBC将拒绝为电信设备办理清关。
summary.zht: 無線設備境外製造商不得以境外法人名義直接將產品進口至印度尼西亞。所有電信設備須由印度尼西亞法律實體——Importir Umum（IU，經銷進口商）或Importir Produsen（IP，自用生產進口商）——擔任進口備案方。當地進口商須持有貿易部（Kemendag）頒發的API（Angka Pengenal Importir）許可證：普通進口商持API-U，生產進口商持API-P。進口商實體須為依印度尼西亞法律註冊的PT（有限責任公司）或CV。進口商名稱須載明於向DJBC申報的PIB（Pemberitahuan Impor Barang）進口報關單，並可能須作為授權代表列入SDPPI sertifikasi perangkat申請。歷史術語POSTEL（郵政與電信）指現已更名為KOMINFO下SDPPI的前身機構；型號認證申報門戶仍保留域名sertifikasi.postel.go.id。若無符合資質的印度尼西亞實體擔任進口商，DJBC將拒絕為電信設備辦理清關。

standards_or_laws: Undang-Undang No. 36 Tahun 1999 tentang Telekomunikasi — Article requiring certified devices and importer declaration
Peraturan Menteri Kominfo No. 16 Tahun 2018 — Authorised representative / importer declaration in sertifikasi perangkat application
Peraturan Menteri Perdagangan (Kemendag) on API — Angka Pengenal Importir regime (API-U and API-P) governing general and producer importers
Peraturan Menteri Perdagangan No. 18 Tahun 2021 tentang Barang Dilarang Ekspor dan Barang Dilarang Impor (Restricted import categories requiring API licence for telecommunications equipment)

summary.en: China's domestic market does not impose a mandatory in-country importer registration requirement on Chinese manufacturers selling locally. Chinese manufacturers interact directly with SRRC, MIIT, CNCA, and CNAS-accredited laboratories for domestic certifications. For products exported to Indonesia, Chinese manufacturers must separately establish or appoint an Indonesian PT entity as Importir Umum or Importir Produsen holding an API licence. This obligation has no parallel in the Chinese domestic regulatory or export compliance chain and must be resolved before any SDPPI type approval application can be submitted on behalf of a foreign manufacturer.
summary.zh: 中国境内市场对中国制造商在国内销售不设强制性当地进口商注册要求。中国制造商直接与SRRC、MIIT、CNCA及CNAS认可实验室交互完成国内认证。对于出口至印度尼西亚的产品，中国制造商须另行设立或指定持有API许可证的印度尼西亚PT实体担任Importir Umum或Importir Produsen。该义务在中国国内监管或出口合规链条中无对应要求，须在提交境外制造商的SDPPI型号认证申请前解决。
summary.zht: 中國境內市場對中國製造商在國內銷售不設強制性當地進口商註冊要求。中國製造商直接與SRRC、MIIT、CNCA及CNAS認可實驗室交互完成國內認證。對於出口至印度尼西亞的產品，中國製造商須另行設立或指定持有API許可證的印度尼西亞PT實體擔任Importir Umum或Importir Produsen。該義務在中國國內監管或出口合規鏈條中無對應要求，須在提交境外製造商的SDPPI型號認證申請前解決。

standards_or_laws: No equivalent mandatory in-country importer registration applies to Chinese manufacturers in the Chinese domestic market
For reference: Chinese export formalities handled by customs declaration under PRC Customs Law (Hai Guan Fa) — importer obligation sits with the Indonesian side

gap.en: The Indonesian Importir Umum / Importir Produsen requirement with API licence is a mandatory structural obligation for all foreign device manufacturers — not merely a documentation gap. A PT or CV entity must be legally registered in Indonesia with the relevant Ministry of Trade (Kemendag) import licences before any SDPPI certification application can proceed. Chinese exporters who lack an established Indonesian distributor, trading partner, or subsidiary cannot initiate SDPPI type approval or complete customs clearance. Common error: Chinese exporters ship telecommunications equipment using a freight forwarder's PIB without a proper API-licensed importer and without an SDPPI certificate — DJBC will detain and may return the shipment at the exporter's cost.
gap.zh: 印度尼西亚持API许可证的Importir Umum / Importir Produsen要求是对所有境外设备制造商的强制结构性义务——而非单纯的文件差距。PT或CV实体须在提交任何SDPPI认证申请前，在印度尼西亚完成法律注册并持有贸易部（Kemendag）相关进口许可证。未在印度尼西亚设立分销商、贸易伙伴或子公司的中国出口商，无法启动SDPPI型号认证或完成清关。常见错误：中国出口商利用货代的PIB报关单运输电信设备，既无适格API持证进口商，又无SDPPI证书——DJBC将扣押货物，并可能将其退运，费用由出口商承担。
gap.zht: 印度尼西亞持API許可證的Importir Umum / Importir Produsen要求是對所有境外設備製造商的強制結構性義務——而非單純的文件差距。PT或CV實體須在提交任何SDPPI認證申請前，在印度尼西亞完成法律註冊並持有貿易部（Kemendag）相關進口許可證。未在印度尼西亞設立分銷商、貿易夥伴或子公司的中國出口商，無法啟動SDPPI型號認證或完成清關。常見錯誤：中國出口商利用貨代的PIB報關單運輸電信設備，既無適格API持證進口商，又無SDPPI證書——DJBC將扣押貨物，並可能將其退運，費用由出口商承擔。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Indonesian PT entity with API licence (API-U or API-P) as Importir Umum or Importir Produsen required; entity name must appear on PIB customs declaration and in SDPPI type approval application; no direct importation by foreign manufacturer permitted
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable — no equivalent mandatory in-country importer registration requirement exists for Chinese manufacturers in the Chinese domestic market; obligation arises only for the Indonesian side of the transaction

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] An Indonesian PT entity holding an API licence (API-U for Importir Umum or API-P for Importir Produsen) is mandatory for all foreign manufacturers seeking to import wireless devices into Indonesia. This entity must be declared in the SDPPI sertifikasi perangkat application and on the PIB customs declaration filed with DJBC. No equivalent requirement exists in the Chinese domestic regulatory chain. Foreign manufacturers must establish or appoint a qualifying Indonesian legal entity before initiating SDPPI type approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 所有寻求将无线设备进口至印度尼西亚的境外制造商，须有持API许可证（Importir Umum持API-U，Importir Produsen持API-P）的印度尼西亚PT实体。该实体须在SDPPI sertifikasi perangkat申请及向DJBC申报的PIB报关单中声明。中国国内监管链条中无对应要求。境外制造商须在启动SDPPI型号认证前设立或指定符合资质的印度尼西亚法律实体。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 所有尋求將無線設備進口至印度尼西亞的境外製造商，須有持API許可證（Importir Umum持API-U，Importir Produsen持API-P）的印度尼西亞PT實體。該實體須在SDPPI sertifikasi perangkat申請及向DJBC申報的PIB報關單中聲明。中國國內監管鏈條中無對應要求。境外製造商須在啟動SDPPI型號認證前設立或指定符合資質的印度尼西亞法律實體。
